limitations: Prototype limited to regex‑based redaction; does not parse structured JSON fields beyond strings.

work_packets.Privacy: Formal redaction spec, encryption for manual review tickets.

work_packets.QA: Synthetic ticket generator, deterministic test harness, CI integration.
